title: TypeScript conformance
summary: Agents writing, reviewing, or testing durable repository TypeScript and TSX MUST apply governance/handbooks/typescript/style-guide.md and the configured formatter.
instructions: Agents writing, reviewing, or testing TypeScript MUST inspect the normative sections of governance/handbooks/typescript/style-guide.md before completion.
Agents MUST run the configured formatter and type checker before completion and MUST treat formatter output as authoritative.

Workflow-local automation under runtime/logs/workflows/<run-id>/scripts/ MAY be throwaway and need not conform to the repository TypeScript style guide unless it is promoted into durable repository code.
Agents MUST NOT inspect Appendix A during ordinary implementation or review unless they are changing formatter configuration or integration.
